name: Roi Calculator
desc: Roi Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
description: Roi Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use the free Roi Calculator to get precise results in seconds. Simply enter your measurements — no registration required.
example_label: Calculating return on investment for €25,000 investment that generated €38,500 in returns.
result_context: The roi_pct of {roi_pct}% shows your return percentage. the beneficio_neto of {beneficio_neto} is your absolute profit.
mistakes: Not including all investment costs (fees, taxes, transaction costs)
Confusing total gain with net profit in ROI calculation
Not considering the time period over which ROI was achieved
